name: MouseRider's Bedroom
description:
This can hardly be a bedroom--this is a room so spartan surely no
human could spend any time here at all!  There is a small pallet in
one corner, with a chair and a paper-stand next to it.  A small lamp
lights up that small area, leaving the rest of the room enshrouded in
darkness.  In the gloom to the west, you can barely make out a large
steel door.

   As you peer at the large steel door more and more, you start to
make out an inscription which reads:

        This Door Has Been Condemned By Order Of Tlion

   You therefore make the assumption that it would be stupid to bash
your head against this un-openable door, and look elsewhere for
adventure.

extra_descriptions.description: This door seems welded shut.  You'll never open it!
